title: croton blanchetianus
intro: Croton blanchetianus, also known as the Ceylon croton or Philippine croton, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to the Philippines. The medicinal properties of Croton blanchetianus include its use as a treatment for fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from pain and fever. The herbal preparations of Croton blanchetianus include making a decoction from the leaves and roots, which can be used topically or taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
